name: Kinpo Electronics, Inc.
summary: Kinpo Electronics, Inc. designs, manufactures, assembles, purchases, and sells consumer electronics, communication, computing, and data storage products worldwide. The company offers 3D printer product lines; storage products; network attached storage products; printer modules and fax machines; wireless and broadband products; set-top-boxes; all-in-one PC and motherboards; formatters, color laser MFPs, laser scan units, and laser printer controllers; and calculators, electronic keyboards, e-dictionaries, gaming mouse and BT joysticks, GPS and GPS modules, auto floor cleaners, photo printers, e-books and tablets, and pachinko displays. It also provides home automation, smartwatch and ring, and fingerprint sensor products; PCBAs for cameras and AV products; LED outdoor and indoor lighting products; PC, server, and storage power supplies, as well as AC/DC adapters, and DC/DC and AC/DC converters; smart grid enabling products and smart power meters; controllers for air condition systems and industrial HVAC boards; automotive body control boards and lightings; and bank teller vault protection systems and high voltage power distribution modules. In addition, the company offers surgical detection systems; green oak leaf, butterhead, green leaf, romaine, red oak leaf, coriander, ice plant, arugula, bughatti oak, and veredes oak; chassis for ATM and gaming machines; plastic parts for printers and plotters, automated chip assembly and medical product parts, and ink cartridges; and precision components. Kinpo Electronics, Inc. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
